items.description: NebulaDB is a blazing-fast, lightweight, disk-backed key/value store written in Go (Fiber). New in v2.3: short URLs & version IDs, atomic durable writes, built-in SQLite execution, and a rich /stats endpoint.

items.name: rust-rule-engine

Production-ready for business rules, expert systems, and decision automation.

Features include SPA support, JS endpoint extraction, and smart deduplication.
